message:
🌱 Add weaviate: [Feature Request] Add "Not" operator in filter to support mission (#1206)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "weaviate-3683-feature-request-add-not-operator-in-filter-to-support-not-like-etc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "weaviate: [Feature Request] Add \"Not\" operator in filter to support \"Not Like\" etc. in Get queries",
+    "description": "[Feature Request] Add \"Not\" operator in filter to support \"Not Like\" etc. in Get queries. Requested by 79+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current weaviate deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your weaviate version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nhelm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working weaviate installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review weaviate configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate\n```\nIt looks like a previously faulty not operator was removed: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/pull/3360\n\nBut I can't see any way to filter a search by excluding some matching criteria."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature Request] Add \"Not\" operator in filter to support…",
+        "description": "### What's being changed:\nhttps://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/3683\r\nThe three row_reader classes have duplicate codes, can further DRY the code in a future refactor \n\n### Review checklist\n```yaml\nconst response = await client.graphql\n  .get()\n  .withClassName('Snippet')\n  .withFields('text')\n  .withWhere({\n    path: ['url'],\n    operator: 'Like',\n    valueText: 'https://example.org*',\n  })\n  .do();\nconsole.log(response);\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature Request] Add \"Not\" operator in filter to support…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What's being changed:\nhttps://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/3683\r\nThe three row_reader classes have duplicate codes, can further DRY the code in a future refactor \n\n### Review checklist",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "const response = await client.graphql\n  .get()\n  .withClassName('Snippet')\n  .withFields('text')\n  .withWhere({\n    path: ['url'],\n    operator: 'Like',\n    valueText: 'https://example.org*',\n  })\n  .do();\nconsole.log(response);",
+        "const response = await client.graphql\n  .get()\n  .withClassName('Snippet')\n  .withFields('text')\n  .withWhere({\n                operator: 'Not',\n                operands: [{\n                    path: ['url'],\n                    operator: 'Like',\n                    valueText: 'https://example.org*',\n                }],\n            })\n  .do();\nconsole.log(response);"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "weaviate",
+      "community",
+      "vector-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "weaviate"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/3683",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/pull/4310"
+    },
+    "reactions": 79,
+    "comments": 27,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with weaviate installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:50:45.075Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
